body:
* Removes the catches we had around the freezing temperature to prevent saturation adjustment from oscillating when there is a discontinuity (Heaviside function) in phase partitioning at freezing. (Right now we have continuous phase partitioning and do not need these catches, which cause problems with automatic differentiation.)
* Larger changes to the test suite, which were necessary since it was testing for exact freezing temperatures, which will only be returned with the catch but not without it. I changed this to approximate (and more meaningful) tests. 
* Reduce code duplication in `saturation_adjustment.jl`
* Rename `condensate_shum` to `condensate_specific_humidity`
* A few smaller doc fixes
title: Remove catches around freezing in saturation adjustment
